retrieved_result: Is a Career in Medicine Right for You? "Choosing your career is one of the most important decisions that you will ever make. When asked why they chose to pursue medicine, most physicians respond that they wanted to make a difference by helping people and positively impacting their lives through health care. Serving others as a physician"
Decision_Reason: The result is about choosing a career in medicine, not about TikTok trends or 2024 trends.
